meta.title: Forest Narratives Studio
meta.description: Forest Narratives Studio. Interactive stories and visual novels.

paragraphs: While traversing the information and telecommunication network known as the “Internet,” you discovered the page of the independent game studio “Forest Narratives”.
The name feels vaguely familiar: perhaps you have already played the text horror quest “Strange House,” available in RuStore for Android devices.
At this very moment, the studio is extremely busy - it is working on the visual novel “The Last Warm Day.”
adventure.question: What will your next actions be?
